text.title: E-commerce Checkout BA Pack Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for ecommerce-checkout-ba-pack. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Pack MUST enumerate all 12 checkout states: cart, address, shipping, summary, payment-init, 3DS / SCA, payment-confirmed, order-created, receipt-sent, error, retry, abandon-recovery; missing states are blocked.
rule.rationale: PCI DSS + PSD2 SCA flow — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.

rule.statement: Pack MUST contain at least 25 edge cases: declined card, 3DS challenge fail, partial stock, address-validation fail, currency mismatch, tax exempt, discount stack collisions, etc. Each carries trigger + expected handling.
rule.rationale: E-commerce checkout failure research — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.

rule.statement: NFR table MUST pin: time-to-interactive < 3s, payment authorisation < 5s P95, error-rate < 0.5% P50, abandonment < industry median; each backed by an observable metric.
rule.rationale: Web vitals + payment-provider SLAs — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.

rule.statement: Pack MUST include regulatory checklist: PSD2 SCA, GDPR consent, PCI DSS scope, OSS/IOSS (EU), local-tax-id capture if B2B, age-verification if regulated goods.
rule.rationale: PSD2 + GDPR + PCI DSS — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.

rule.statement: For each payment provider, pack pins: API version, webhook contract, retry policy, idempotency key strategy, refund flow, dispute flow.
rule.rationale: Stripe / Adyen / Mollie API references — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.

rule.statement: Checkout MUST meet WCAG 2.2 AA: keyboard nav, ARIA labels, contrast ratios, error-recovery hints, no time-limited steps without warning.
rule.rationale: WCAG 2.2 AA — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.

rule.statement: Pack ships test-data set for every PSP: success card, declined card, 3DS-required card, refundable scenario, dispute scenario.
rule.rationale: PSP sandbox documentation — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.

rule.statement: If the engagement is not e-commerce or has no checkout flow, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to E-commerce Checkout BA Pack.
